description_long: This is a modern kitchen knife featuring a straight, pointed stainless steel blade with a fine edge, suitable for slicing and chopping. The blade is seamlessly joined to a black handle, which is ergonomically shaped and secured with three visible rivets for durability and comfort. The handle appears to be made of a synthetic or composite material, providing a glossy finish and a secure grip. The knife has a full tang construction, as indicated by the visible metal running through the handle. There is no visible guard between the blade and handle, giving it a streamlined appearance. The overall design is utilitarian, with no decorative elements or ornamentation.
description: A modern kitchen knife with a straight, pointed steel blade and a glossy black riveted handle. The design is sleek, functional, and free of ornamentation.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the straight blade and the black handle with three rivets.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the thinness of the blade and the width of the handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the blade and handle profile, mirroring view 0.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view emphasizing the slim blade and the handle's ergonomic contour.
attribute_handle_design: straight, black, synthetic, three rivets, ergonomic contour
